Plot Event (Skeleton): Bon helps Mom in the herb shop while Dad is away.
Emotional/Thematic Depth (Soul): The "Piece of Shit" Reflection: "I never helped my mom in Japan. I let her carry the groceries. I'm doing this right this time." He is over-correcting out of guilt.

Plot Event (Skeleton): Soldiers arrive. Bon tries to hide Mom.
Emotional/Thematic Depth (Soul): The Failure: Despite his adult mind, he is physically weak. He realizes "being smart" isn't enough to protect what you love.

Plot Event (Skeleton): Mom is dragged away. Bon is held at swordpoint.
Emotional/Thematic Depth (Soul): The Pivot: He suppresses his fear (Adult discipline) to negotiate his survival. He sells his soul (joins the bad guys) to gain the power to save her.

Plot Event (Skeleton): He washes dishes, cleans gore, fixes armor.
Emotional/Thematic Depth (Soul): The Penance: He views this suffering as punishment for his past life. "I deserve this dirt. But I will survive it for her."
